revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Iwatsuhime Shrine]][[ja:伊和都比売神社]] {{Expand Japanese|伊和都比売神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Iwatsuhime Shrine | native_name = 伊和都比売神社 | image = Iwatsuhime shrine003s2000.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Iwatsuhime Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.727393|134.408187}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Iwatsuhime Shrine'''|伊和都比売神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Harima Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database * {{ill|Q135026601|ltq=Q135026601|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province|ja|播磨国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11498723|1=List of Shikinaisha in Harima Province}} ** Series ordinal: 19 ** P155: {{ill|Q135041155|ltq=Q135041155|qid=Q135041155|1=Iheshimano Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Yahono Shrine|lt=Yahono Shrine|qid=Q135041156|1=Yahono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q424813|ltq=Q424813|qid=Q424813|1=Akō, Hyōgo}} * {{ill|Q1047523|ltq=Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}} * {{ill|Akō District, Hyōgo|lt=Ako district|ceb|Akō-gun|en|Akō District, Hyōgo|es|Distrito de Akō|fa|شهرستان آکو، هیوگو|fr|District d'Akō|id|Distrik Akō, Hyōgo|it|Distretto di Akō|ja|赤穂郡|ko|아코군|pl|Powiat Akō|ru|Ако (уезд)|zh|赤穗郡|qid=Q1042141|1=Akō District, Hyōgo}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.727393|134.408187}} == image (P18) == * Iwatsuhime shrine003s2000.jpg == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183025 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Q3029647|ltq=Q3029647|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いわつひめじんじゃ == Instagram username (P2003) == * iwatsuhime_shrine == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 1140005007645 == Commons category (P373) == * Iwatsuhime Shrine == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '兵庫県赤穂市御崎字三崎山1', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '兵庫県赤穂市御崎1', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Iwatsuhime Shrine}} [[JA:伊和都比売神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11379249}} == Japanese content == {{Citation needed|date=December 2019}} {{神社 | 名称=Iwatsuhime Shrine | 画像=[[ファイル:Iwatsuhime shrine003s2000.jpg|250px]]
Haiden | 所在地={{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ako|Q424813|qid=Q424813|1=Akō, Hyōgo}}Misaki Aza Misakiyama 1 | 位置={{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|43|38.7|N|134|24|29.5|E|region:JP-28|display=inline,title}} | 祭神=Iwatsuhime Ōkami | 社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (small)
former {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} | 地図= {{Location map|Japan Hyogo|label=Iwatsuhime
Shrine|position=right|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=230}} }} [[ファイル:Iwatsuhime shrine005n4272.jpg|thumb|240px|Torii facing the sea]] [[ファイル:Iwatsuhime shrine004n4272.jpg|thumb|240px|Sea view through the torii]] '''Iwatsuhime Shrine''' (いわつひめじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Misaki|Q11488946|qid=Q11488946|1=Cape Misaki}}, {{ill|lt=Ako|Q424813|qid=Q424813|1=Akō, Hyōgo}}, {{ill|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture|Q130290|qid=Q130290|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, and its former rank under the {{ill|lt=Modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}} was {{ill|lt=gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. Located in the {{ill|lt=Ako Misaki Onsen|Q11635887|qid=Q11635887|1=Akō-Misaki Onsen}} area, it stands facing the sea. It is worshiped for sailing safety and matchmaking{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.kobe-np.co.jp/news/sougou/202208/0015535551.shtml |title=Panoramic Seto Inland Sea glamping: luxury dome tents, sauna, and BBQ with local oysters opens in Ako on the 11th |accessdate=2022-08-08|date=2022-08-07|publisher=Kobe Shimbun}}. === Enshrined deity === The enshrined deity is Iwatsuhime Ōkami. Originally this may have been {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Toyouke-hime|1=UNKNOWN}}, or the {{ill|lt=himegami|Q22070227|qid=Q22070227|lt=female deity|1=Himegami}} of Ōanamuchi-no-Kami, deity of Iwaza Ōanamochi Mitama Shrine (present {{ill|lt=Iwa Shrine|Q65320|qid=Q65320|1=Iwa Shrine (Matsumoto)}}), ichinomiya of {{ill|lt=Harima Province|Q1047523|qid=Q1047523|1=Harima Province}}. It has long been called "Misaki Myōjin." === History === An ancient shrine listed first among three shrines of {{ill|lt=Ako District|Q1042141|qid=Q1042141|1=Akō District, Hyōgo}} in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} of the {{ill|lt=Heian period|Q193292|qid=Q193292|1=Heian period}}. A shrine formerly on the offshore reef "Hatchō-iwa" was moved to the current site in {{ill|lt=Tenna (Japan)|Q1145289|qid=Q1145289|lt=Tenna|1=Tenna}} 3 ({{ill|lt=1683|Q7651|qid=Q7651|1=1683}}) of the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|qid=Q184963|1=Edo period}} by {{ill|lt=Asano Naganori|Q2866309|qid=Q2866309|1=Asano Naganao}}. In the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era|qid=Q3125096}}, {{ill|lt=Tōgō Heihachirō|Q296785|qid=Q296785|1=Tōgō Heihachirō}} visited here before the outbreak of the {{ill|lt=Russo-Japanese War|Q159950|qid=Q159950|1=Russo-Japanese War}} to pray for victory. Because of this, it gained devotion from {{ill|lt=Imperial Japanese Navy|Q219712|qid=Q219712|lt=Imperial Navy|1=Imperial Japanese Navy}} personnel, and until before the war, Combined Fleet commanders including Togo worshiped from ships at sea. Even today, sailors actively worship from the sea for navigation safety and big catches. === Precinct === File:Iwatsuhime-jinja, honden.jpg|Honden File:Iwatsuhime-jinja, haiden.jpg|Haiden File:Iwatsuhime-jinja, keidaisha.jpg|Precinct shrine === Access === * From {{ill|lt=Banshū-Akō Station|Q4857136|qid=Q4857136|1=Banshū-Akō Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Akō Line|Q1049803|qid=Q1049803|1=Akō Line}}, bus ({{ill|lt=West Shinki|Q11288667|qid=Q11288667|1=West Shinki}}) toward "{{ill|lt=Misaki|Q11488946|qid=Q11488946|1=Cape Misaki}} / Recreation Center" for 15 minutes, get off at "Misaki," then 5 minutes on foot === Nearby === *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ako Misaki|1=UNKNOWN}} **Ako Misaki coastal promenade **Kirakira-zaka **Mats pine of Ōishi's remembrance **{{ill|lt=Ako Misaki Onsen|Q11635887|qid=Q11635887|1=Akō-Misaki Onsen}} **{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Fukuura Beach|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Momoi Museum|1=UNKNOWN}} *{{ill|lt=Ako City Tabuchi Memorial Hall|Q11635883|qid=Q11635883|1=Akō City Tabuchi Museum of Art}} *{{ill|lt=Hyogo Prefectural Ako Seaside Park|Q11393120|qid=Q11393120|1=Hyōgo Prefectural Akō Seaside Park}} **{{ill|lt=Ako City Marine Science Museum|Q11635882|qid=Q11635882|1=Akō Marine Science Museum}} === Iwatsuhime Shrine of Akashi District === In the Engishiki Jinmyōchō, an Iwatsuhime Shrine of {{ill|lt=Akashi District|Q11512561|qid=Q11512561|1=Akashi District, Hyōgo}} in Harima Province is also listed. Today there is no same-name shrine in former Akashi District; candidate shrines are {{ill|lt=Inazume Shrine|Q11596731|qid=Q11596731|1=Inazume Shrine}} in Ōkura Honmachi, Akashi, Inazumehama Ebisu Shrine (a sessha within Inazume Shrine), {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Izanami Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} in Misaki-chō, Akashi, and {{ill|lt=Iwaya Shrine (Hyogo)|UNKNOWN|lt=Iwaya Shrine}} in Zaimoku-chō, Akashi. === Notes === {{脚注ヘルプ}} === External links === {{Commonscat|Iwatsuhime_Shrine}} * [https://iwatsuhimejinja.jp/ Iwatsuhime Shrine] - official site * {{Instagram|iwatsuhime_shrine}} * [http://www.ako-kankou.jp/shousai/iwatuhime.html Ako Tourism Association "Iwatsuhime Shrine"] {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Iwatsuhime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Iwatsuhime Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Hyōgo Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Ako, Hyogo]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Akō]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Harima Province]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Hyōgo Prefecture]]
